name: PT Perdana Gapuraprima Tbk
summary: PT Perdana Gapuraprima Tbk develops real estate properties in Indonesia. The company develops shopping centers, offices, apartments, hotels, condotels, houses, commercial, and mixed used projects. It also engages in planning and supervising housing and building development activities, as well as purchasing and selling of buildings and land rights. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Perdana Gapuraprima Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Citraabadi Kotapersada.
